Localization.Description: CISE Administrative and Operational Audit login

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the system on host {event_src.host} via the {protocol.layer7} protocol
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system on host {event_src.host} via the {protocol.layer7} protocol. Reason: {reason}
